option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "version": "2.0", "created": "2025-01-30", "project": "ananta", "categories": [ { "name": "backend-hub-refactoring", "label": "Backend Hub – Strukturelle Verbesserungen", "items": [ { "id": "HUB-001", "title": "HubServer God-Class aufbrechen (SRP)", "description": "HubServer.ts vereint Routing, Worker-Management, Task-Queue-Logik und Server-Lifecycle. Aufteilen in: HubServer (nur Lifecycle), TaskRouter, WorkerRegistry, TaskQueueManager.", "priority": "high", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/hub/src/HubServer.ts"] }, { "id": "HUB-002", "title": "Port/Adapter-Pattern für Worker-Kommunikation einführen (DIP)", "description": "Worker-Kommunikation aktuell direkt über HTTP-Calls im Hub-Code. Abstraktion über ein WorkerGateway-Interface einführen, konkrete HTTP-Implementierung dahinter. Ermöglicht spätere Erweiterung (gRPC, Message Queue).", "priority": "high", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "DIP, OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-003", "title": "Zentrale Error-Handling-Middleware einführen", "description": "Aktuell verstreutes try/catch. Zentrale Express Error-Handling-Middleware mit typisierten Error-Klassen (TaskError, WorkerError, ValidationError) einführen.", "priority": "high", "type": "improvement", "principle": "SRP, OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-004", "title": "Konfigurationsmanagement zentralisieren", "description": "Konfigurationswerte (Ports, Worker-URLs, Timeouts) in ein zentrales Config-Modul mit Validierung auslagern. Aktuell teilweise hardcoded oder über process.env verstreut.", "priority": "medium", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-005", "title": "Task-Queue als eigenen Service extrahieren", "description": "Task-Queue-Logik in eigene Klasse mit klarem Interface (enqueue, dequeue, status, cancel). Vorbereitung für spätere Persistierung (Redis, DB).", "priority": "medium", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP, ISP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-006", "title": "Health-Check-Endpoint standardisieren", "description": "Health-Check-Endpoint mit strukturierter Antwort (Status aller Worker, Queue-Tiefe, Uptime). Eigener HealthService mit Interface.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-007", "title": "Request-Validation-Layer einführen", "description": "Zod oder Joi Schema-Validierung für alle eingehenden API-Requests. Aktuell keine systematische Input-Validierung.", "priority": "high", "type": "improvement", "principle": "SRP, Security", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-008", "title": "Logging-Abstraktion einführen", "description": "Strukturiertes Logging über ein Logger-Interface statt direktem console.log. Ermöglicht verschiedene Backends (Winston, Pino) ohne Code-Änderung.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "principle": "DIP, OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-009", "title": "Dependency Injection Container einführen", "description": "Leichtgewichtigen DI-Container (tsyringe oder manuell) einführen, um Abhängigkeiten im Hub sauber zu verdrahten statt direkter Instanziierung.", "priority": "medium", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "DIP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "HUB-010", "title": "Rate-Limiting und Request-Throttling für Hub-API", "description": "Rate-Limiting Middleware um die Hub-API vor Überlastung zu schützen. Besonders wichtig wenn externe Trigger Tasks einliefern.", "priority": "low", "type": "feature", "principle": "Security", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] } ] }, { "name": "backend-worker-refactoring", "label": "Backend Worker – Strukturelle Verbesserungen", "items": [ { "id": "WRK-001", "title": "Worker-Basisklasse / Interface standardisieren", "description": "Gemeinsames Worker-Interface definieren (register, heartbeat, execute_task, report_result). Alle Worker-Implementierungen davon ableiten. Aktuell fehlt ein klarer Vertrag.", "priority": "high", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "LSP, ISP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "WRK-002", "title": "LLM-Provider-Abstraktion im Worker", "description": "LLM-Aufrufe hinter ein Provider-Interface stellen (LLMProvider mit Methoden wie complete, chat, embed). Konkrete Implementierungen für OpenAI, Anthropic, lokale Modelle. Aktuell zu eng gekoppelt.", "priority": "high", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "DIP, OCP, SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "WRK-003", "title": "Worker-Heartbeat-Mechanismus robuster machen", "description": "Heartbeat mit Retry-Logik, exponential Backoff, und Graceful-Degradation bei Hub-Unerreichbarkeit.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "WRK-004", "title": "Task-Execution-Timeout im Worker", "description": "Konfigurierbare Timeouts für Task-Ausführung mit sauberem Abbruch und Statusmeldung an den Hub.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "WRK-005", "title": "Worker-Plugin-System für Task-Handler", "description": "Strategy-Pattern für Task-Handler im Worker. Neue Task-Typen können als Plugins registriert werden ohne bestehenden Code zu ändern.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "OCP, SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "WRK-006", "title": "Strukturiertes Logging auch im Worker", "description": "Einheitliches strukturiertes Logging (JSON-Format) für bessere Auswertbarkeit in Container-Umgebungen.", "priority": "low", "type": "improvement", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] } ] }, { "name": "shared-packages", "label": "Shared Packages – Typen und Contracts", "items": [ { "id": "SHR-001", "title": "API-Contract-Types zwischen Hub und Worker formalisieren", "description": "Alle Request/Response-Typen für Hub-Worker-Kommunikation in shared definieren. Aktuell Risiko von Drift zwischen Hub (TS) und Worker (Python).", "priority": "high", "type": "improvement", "principle": "LSP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["packages/shared/"] }, { "id": "SHR-002", "title": "OpenAPI/JSON-Schema für Hub-Worker-Kommunikation", "description": "OpenAPI-Spec als Single-Source-of-Truth für die API-Contracts. Daraus TypeScript-Types und Python-Pydantic-Models generieren.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "LSP, DIP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["packages/shared/", "apps/hub/", "apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "SHR-003", "title": "Task-Status-Enum und State-Machine formalisieren", "description": "Task-Lifecycle als State-Machine definieren (PENDING → ASSIGNED → RUNNING → COMPLETED/FAILED/CANCELLED). Klare Übergänge validieren.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["packages/shared/"] }, { "id": "SHR-004", "title": "Event-Types für Hub-Events definieren", "description": "Typisierte Events (TaskCreated, TaskAssigned, WorkerRegistered, etc.) für spätere Event-Bus-Integration.", "priority": "low", "type": "feature", "principle": "OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["packages/shared/"] } ] }, { "name": "frontend-refactoring", "label": "Frontend – Strukturelle Verbesserungen", "items": [ { "id": "FE-001", "title": "API-Service-Layer einführen", "description": "API-Aufrufe aus Komponenten extrahieren in dedizierte Service-Klassen/Funktionen (TaskService, WorkerService, etc.). Aktuell fetch-Calls direkt in Komponenten.", "priority": "high", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP, DIP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-002", "title": "Zentrales State-Management einführen", "description": "Zustand (oder alternatives leichtgewichtiges State-Management) für globalen App-State. Aktuell prop-drilling und lokaler State.", "priority": "high", "type": "improvement", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-003", "title": "Komponenten-Hierarchie überarbeiten", "description": "Flache Komponenten-Struktur in Feature-basierte Ordnerstruktur umbauen: features/tasks/, features/workers/, features/dashboard/, shared/components/.", "priority": "medium", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-004", "title": "Custom Hooks für API-Interaktion", "description": "React Custom Hooks (useTaskList, useWorkerStatus, useTaskSubmit) als Abstraktion zwischen Komponenten und API-Layer.", "priority": "medium", "type": "refactoring", "principle": "SRP, DIP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-005", "title": "Error-Boundary und globales Error-Handling", "description": "React Error Boundary Komponente für Crash-Handling. Toast/Notification-System für API-Fehler.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-006", "title": "Loading/Skeleton-States standardisieren", "description": "Einheitliche Loading-Komponenten und Skeleton-Screens statt verstreuter Spinner/Loading-Texte.", "priority": "low", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-007", "title": "WebSocket-Verbindung für Live-Updates", "description": "WebSocket-Verbindung zum Hub für Echtzeit-Updates von Task-Status und Worker-Health statt Polling.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/", "apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-008", "title": "Dark/Light Theme Toggle", "description": "Theme-Switching mit TailwindCSS dark mode. Persistierung in localStorage.", "priority": "low", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-009", "title": "Task-Detail-View mit Log-Streaming", "description": "Detailansicht für einzelne Tasks mit Live-Log-Ausgabe und Statusverlauf.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "FE-010", "title": "Dashboard mit Worker-Health-Übersicht", "description": "Dashboard-View mit Übersicht aller Worker (Status, Last-Heartbeat, Auslastung), Task-Queue-Tiefe, System-Health.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/src/"] } ] }, { "name": "infrastructure", "label": "Infrastruktur & DevOps", "items": [ { "id": "INF-001", "title": "Docker-Compose Health-Checks hinzufügen", "description": "Health-Check-Konfiguration in docker-compose für Hub und Worker Container. Automatic Restart bei Failure.", "priority": "high", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["docker-compose.yml"] }, { "id": "INF-002", "title": "Multi-Stage Docker Builds optimieren", "description": "Docker-Images mit Multi-Stage Builds verkleinern. Separate Build- und Runtime-Stages.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["apps/hub/Dockerfile", "apps/ananta-worker/Dockerfile"] }, { "id": "INF-003", "title": "Environment-Konfiguration über .env-Dateien standardisieren", "description": "Einheitliche .env / .env.example Dateien für alle Services mit dokumentierten Variablen.", "priority": "medium", "type": "improvement", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": [".env.example", "apps/hub/.env.example", "apps/ananta-worker/.env.example"] }, { "id": "INF-004", "title": "CI/CD Pipeline Grundgerüst", "description": "GitHub Actions Workflow für: Lint, Type-Check, Tests, Docker Build. Grundgerüst für spätere Erweiterung.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": [".github/workflows/"] }, { "id": "INF-005", "title": "Container-Networking dokumentieren", "description": "Netzwerk-Architektur zwischen Hub und Worker Containern dokumentieren. DNS-Auflösung, Port-Mapping, Service-Discovery.", "priority": "low", "type": "documentation", "status": "open", "effort": "small", "files": ["docs/"] } ] }, { "name": "testing", "label": "Testing", "items": [ { "id": "TST-001", "title": "Unit-Test-Setup für Hub", "description": "Vitest/Jest Setup für Hub mit Mock-Infrastruktur für Worker-Kommunikation. Grundlegende Tests für TaskQueue und WorkerRegistry.", "priority": "high", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/"] }, { "id": "TST-002", "title": "Unit-Test-Setup für Worker (Python)", "description": "Pytest Setup für Worker mit Mock-Hub. Tests für Task-Execution und LLM-Provider-Abstraktion.", "priority": "high", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-worker/"] }, { "id": "TST-003", "title": "Integration-Tests für Hub-Worker-Kommunikation", "description": "Docker-Compose-basierte Integration-Tests die den vollen Task-Lifecycle testen (Submit → Assign → Execute → Complete).", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["tests/integration/"] }, { "id": "TST-004", "title": "Frontend-Component-Tests", "description": "Vitest + Testing Library Setup für React-Komponenten. Tests für kritische UI-Flows.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/ananta-ui/"] } ] }, { "name": "features-new", "label": "Neue Feature-Ideen", "items": [ { "id": "NEW-001", "title": "Goal-basiertes Task-Interface", "description": "Gemäß AGENTS.md Long-Term Direction: UI und API für Goal-Eingabe. Hub zerlegt Goal in Plan → Tasks. Erste Version: einfache Goal-zu-Task-Decomposition.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "xlarge", "files": ["apps/hub/src/", "apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "NEW-002", "title": "Task-Ergebnis-Verifikation im Hub", "description": "Hub kann Task-Ergebnisse verifizieren bevor sie als 'completed' markiert werden. Einfache regelbasierte Checks als erster Schritt.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "NEW-003", "title": "Worker-Scaling: Mehrere Worker-Instanzen", "description": "Support für mehrere Worker-Instanzen desselben Typs. Hub verteilt Tasks nach Auslastung (Round-Robin oder Least-Connections).", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/hub/src/", "docker-compose.yml"] }, { "id": "NEW-004", "title": "Task-History und Audit-Log", "description": "Persistierte History aller Tasks mit Status-Übergängen und Ergebnissen. Erste Version: SQLite oder JSON-File. Spätere Migration zu PostgreSQL.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "Security, SRP", "status": "open", "effort": "large", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "NEW-005", "title": "Worker-Capability-Registry", "description": "Worker melden bei Registrierung ihre Capabilities (supported task types, available models, resource limits). Hub nutzt dies für intelligenteres Routing.", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/", "apps/ananta-worker/", "packages/shared/"] }, { "id": "NEW-006", "title": "Retry-Policy für fehlgeschlagene Tasks", "description": "Konfigurierbare Retry-Policies pro Task-Typ (max retries, backoff strategy, dead-letter handling).", "priority": "medium", "type": "feature", "principle": "OCP", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/"] }, { "id": "NEW-007", "title": "Prompt-Template-Management", "description": "Verwaltung von Prompt-Templates im Hub. Worker erhalten Template + Variablen statt fertige Prompts. Versionierung von Templates.", "priority": "low", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/", "apps/ananta-ui/src/"] }, { "id": "NEW-008", "title": "Cost-Tracking für LLM-Aufrufe", "description": "Worker melden Token-Usage zurück an Hub. Hub trackt Kosten pro Task, pro Goal, gesamt. Dashboard-Anzeige.", "priority": "low", "type": "feature", "status": "open", "effort": "medium", "files": ["apps/hub/src/", "apps/ananta-worker/", "apps/ananta-ui/src/"] } ] } ], "meta": { "total_items": 38, "by_priority": { "high": 10, "medium": 22, "low": 6 }, "by_type": { "refactoring": 10, "improvement": 10, "feature": 17, "documentation": 1 }, "recommended_order": [ "HUB-001 – God-Class aufbrechen ist Grundlage für alle weiteren Hub-Änderungen", "HUB-003 – Error-Handling früh einführen", "HUB-007 – Input-Validierung ist Security-kritisch", "FE-001 – API-Layer ist Grundlage für alle Frontend-Verbesserungen", "SHR-001 – API-Contracts formalisieren verhindert Drift", "WRK-001 – Worker-Interface standardisieren", "TST-001/002 – Test-Setup ermöglicht sicheres Refactoring", "INF-001 – Docker Health-Checks für Stabilität" ] } }
